title: Phase 2: Zcash wallet and P2P payments
description:
Add privacy-preserving P2P payments via Zcash shielded transactions. Payments are negotiated inside encrypted envelopes — the relay never sees amounts, addresses, or transaction IDs.

Phase 2 scope: testnet first, then mainnet.

Required sub-tasks:
- zcash_client_backend integration in nie-core (or separate nie-wallet crate)
- Connect to public lightwalletd endpoint (testnet: lightwalletd.testnet.z.cash)
- P2P payment negotiation state machine using ClearMessage::Payment envelope variants
- CLI commands: /pay <contact> <amount>, /balance, /receive (show shielded address)
- Address generation: unified address (UA) combining Sapling + Orchard receivers
- Payment confirmation: watch for incoming tx, send ClearMessage::Payment(Confirmed) to peer

Out of scope for Phase 2: server-side subscription payments (Phase 3).
notes:
Phase 1 decomposition (2026-04-19): 7 gaps identified and mapped to existing issues.

Wave 0 (parallel, READY now): nie-gw8k (IVK decryption + Note struct + insert_note), agoraold-7766 (commitment tree + witnesses)
Wave 1 (after nie-gw8k): nie-ghf (background watcher task) — child of nie-hov
Wave 2 (after nie-ghf): nie-hll (confirmation depth) — child of nie-hov
Wave 3 (after nie-hll): nie-iiy (send PaymentAction::Confirmed) — child of nie-hov
Wave 4 E2E: nie-3no (testnet E2E) — blocked on nie-gw8k + agoraold-7766

Critical path: nie-gw8k → nie-ghf → nie-hll → nie-iiy → nie-3no (agoraold-7766 parallel)
Also ready: nie-l22.1 (scanner.rs UNIQUE constraint bug fix, P3)
close_reason: All Phase 2 work complete: IVK decryption, Merkle witnesses, send_payment, testnet E2E test scaffolded
